project.name: 桐邻 First 120 Minutes · 精炼设计
project.designRead: mobile H5 + desktop overview / Chengdu Tongzilin community integration route / editorial handbook style with route completion stamp / medium density / bilingual CN/EN equal weight / warm cream paper with deep teal brand DNA
project.styleDefinitionBrief: A refined editorial community exploration handbook for Chengdu Tongzilin: warm cream paper, deep teal brand DNA, Fraunces serif display with Songti SC, terracotta activity accent and amber cultural-tip accent, route completion seal absorbing passport stamp metaphor into editorial language. 5 pages: judge entry, preference builder, two-hour route with map+draggable cards, route completed with stamp seal, desktop overview.

styleContinuityAnchors.colorSystem: primary #0F766E deep teal; dark #123B3A; cream #F6F0E5 base; terracotta #E66A45 for activities only; amber #D39A3A for cultural tips only; body text #263331
styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: 4/8/12px rounded editorial radius; circular stamp seal with dashed inner ring
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Fraunces variable serif (opsz 9-144) for EN display + Songti SC for CN display; PingFang SC for CN/EN body (matches App.vue); JetBrains Mono for time/IDs only
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: generous 20-24px page padding; 16-20px card padding; 8-12px component gaps
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: magazine column hero with route annotations; vertical timeline with place cards; map top half + draggable bottom sheet; editorial completion seal (stamp metaphor refined)
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: cream paper texture base; cards on paper with shadow <=0.04; floating layers shadow <=0.06; stamp seal with subtle inner shadow for ink effect
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: real community photography only (6 images reused); Lucide line icons; no emoji icons; custom SVG for route annotations and stamp seal
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: bilingual CN/EN at equal visual weight; 44px+ touch targets; 10s value comprehension; 30s to route generation

sharedProjectShellContract.radiusScale: 4/8/12px editorial; stamp seal uses circular + dashed inner
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: static cards border-led with shadow <=0.04; floating layers shadow <=0.06; stamp seal with inner shadow
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: primary button bg var(--brand-primary), white text, min-height 44px, radius 8px

pages.title: 评委入口 — 桐邻 First 120 Minutes
pages.visualNorthStar: A warm editorial handbook cover that immediately communicates product value in 10 seconds: a beautiful community photo with bilingual title, a one-sentence value proposition, language toggle, and a prominent start CTA
pages.compositionPattern: asymmetric editorial hero with bilingual title block and sticky CTA

pages.title: 偏好构建 — 桐邻 First 120 Minutes
pages.visualNorthStar: An editorial preference form that feels like filling out a guidebook questionnaire — language, interests, time, distance, goal selection with bilingual chip selectors and a generate-route CTA
pages.compositionPattern: vertical form sections with editorial section dividers and chip selectors

pages.title: 两小时路线 — 桐邻 First 120 Minutes
pages.visualNorthStar: A split-screen route experience: top half is a community map with numbered stops 1/2/3, bottom half is a draggable bottom sheet with route cards showing place photos, cultural tips, and navigation actions
pages.compositionPattern: map top half + draggable bottom sheet with numbered stop cards

pages.title: 路线完成 — 桐邻 First 120 Minutes
pages.visualNorthStar: An editorial completion page featuring a refined route completion seal — a circular stamp with dashed inner ring, serif typography, rotated -8 degrees, on cream paper with decorative dashed route-note frame
pages.compositionPattern: centered completion seal with editorial stats summary and share CTA
continuityAnchors: stamp seal from Direction B refined

pages.title: 桌面概览 — 桐邻 First 120 Minutes
pages.visualNorthStar: A desktop overview spread: left side explains product value with editorial text and community photos, right side shows the mobile interaction body as device mockups arranged in a flow
pages.compositionPattern: split editorial spread: left value proposition column + right mobile mockup gallery
